steps.title: Match claim to examples
steps.content: The passage first states that comics by other Black cartoonists followed Martin Turner's Wee Pals. The final sentence names Ray Armstrong and Kevin Knight as specific cartoonists who later joined those ranks.

steps.title: Choose the example transition
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly signals an earlier event, though the named cartoonists came later. Choice B signals contrast, and choice C signals an alternative. The needed transition introduces concrete examples of the general claim. The answer is D.
